title: enekbatus clavifolius
side_effects: Enekbatus clavifolius can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, it may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling. Additionally, improper use of the plant may result in cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. In extreme cases, long-term use without proper guidance can cause liver and kidney damage.
